whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.p1: AiKang Medical Tour (爱康医旅) was founded with a mission to make premium healthcare accessible to international patients. We specialize in providing comprehensive medical tourism services for patients from the United States and Indonesia, offering a seamless journey from initial consultation to complete recovery.
whoWeAre.p2: While we don't own hospitals ourselves, we've built strong partnerships with China's top JCI-accredited medical institutions, giving our patients access to cutting-end technology and internationally trained specialists.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide international patients with access to China's world-class healthcare through a seamless, transparent, and personalized service experience.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted name in China medical tourism, setting new standards for patient care and international healthcare accessibility.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Compassion, integrity, transparency, and excellence in everything we do. Your health and well-being are our top priorities.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose AiKang?
whyChoose.subtitle: What sets us apart from other medical tourism providers

verified.title: Verified Partner Hospitals
verified.description: We only work with JCI-accredited hospitals that meet international standards for quality and safety.

personal.title: Personal Care Coordinators
personal.description: Each patient receives a dedicated bilingual coordinator available 24/7 throughout their medical journey.

transparent.title: Transparent Pricing
transparent.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide detailed cost estimates upfront before you travel.

aftercare.title: Comprehensive Aftercare
aftercare.description: Our support continues after you return home with telemedicine follow-ups and rehabilitation guidance.

fastTrack.title: Zero Waiting Time
fastTrack.description: Fast-track appointments with top specialists. Surgery scheduling within 7 days of arrival.

logistics.title: Complete Travel Support
logistics.description: From visa assistance to accommodation and local transportation, we handle all logistics.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for a free medical consultation. We're here to help 24/7.
contact.getInTouchDesc: Whether you have questions about our services, need help planning your medical trip, or want a second opinion, our team is ready to assist you.

quickResponse.title: Quick Response Guarantee
quickResponse.description: For WhatsApp inquiries, we typically respond within 1 hour. Email inquiries are answered within 24 hours.

form.title: Send Us an Inquiry
form.name: Full Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your medical condition and what you're looking for...
form.successMessage: Your inquiry has been submitted successfully. Our medical team will review your case and contact you within 24 hours.

q1.q: How do I get started with my medical trip to China?
q1.a: Simply contact us via WhatsApp or email with your medical reports. Our team will arrange consultations with top Chinese specialists and provide you with treatment options and cost estimates within 24 hours.

q2.q: What is the typical cost savings compared to treatment in the US?
q2.a: Most medical procedures in China cost 60-80% less than in the United States, while maintaining equal or better quality of care. For example, heart bypass surgery costs $12,000-25,000 in China vs $100,000-150,000 in the US.

q3.q: How quickly can I schedule surgery after contacting you?
q3.a: We can typically arrange surgery appointments within 7 days of your arrival in China. Our zero waiting time policy is one of the key advantages of choosing medical treatment in China.

q4.q: Do you assist with visa and travel arrangements?
q4.a: Yes, we provide comprehensive assistance including medical visa invitation letters, flight bookings, airport pickup, and accommodation arrangements near our partner hospitals.

q5.q: What language support do you provide?
q5.a: All our care coordinators are bilingual. We also provide professional medical interpretation services during all hospital visits and consultations to ensure clear communication with your medical team.
